text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet asks to meet me on the morning of
Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, right on time. Then, let's get going.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Time to go buy our training supplies!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Obviously? We just planned out my goals,
didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there are a lot of people out and about
today. Look at that line.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see. So they're all lined up to buy chocola—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-it's nothing! Let's just get this over with already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I accompany Daiwa Scarlet as she shops.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Look how much stuff we bought. I didn't
realize it had gotten so late.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: As thanks, I'll buy you a drink. You stay here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure. You did tag along with me all day, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet walks over to the register.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plunk.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Here's some hot cocoa. Something sweet—you
know, as a pick-me-up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It probably counts as chocolate too, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. You're not going to complain that it's
not the real thing, are you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, today's hot chocolate tastes sweeter
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Here's some coffee. And...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: The coffee looked a little bitter, so...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I got some chocolate to sweeten it up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You could melt it in your coffee. Or just eat it like
normal, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...You're welcome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my "bittersweet" Valentine's Day with
Daiwa Scarlet comes to a close.
